_comment: ComfyUI reverse-proxy + coexistence settings (see handle_comfyui_proxy in llama_priority_proxy.py). Delete this file to disable the feature entirely -- routes under /comfyui then return 503. base_url must be reachable from this proxy's own container -- both this proxy and ComfyUI are on the t2_proxy docker network, so the ComfyUI container's service name resolves directly; no host port publish needed for this anymore. coexist_scenario names the scenario (see config/scenario_comfy_coexist.json) activated the moment a generation starts. startup_grace_s: don't even attempt scenario_fits_after_comfy_evict's live VRAM check for this many seconds after comfy_coexist activates -- ComfyUI may still be mid-load (reading its checkpoint off disk into VRAM), during which nvidia-smi's live reading understates its eventual footprint and would wrongly look like there's room to preempt.
